title: PBK Pack Of 50 Bagasse Medium Box (7x5 Inch), 600ml, Biodegradable, Compostable And Disposable Takeaway Food Containers (7" x 5" - 50 Pack)
features: ENVIRONMENTALLY FRIENDLY MATERIAL: Be environmentally conscious with our boxes! These boxes are made from bagasse which is a renewable material that decomposes over time.
PACK OF 50 - This product comes in a pack of 50 boxes, which is a good amount for any event.

VERSATILE: Our boxes are microwave safe, BPA free, and sustainable for both freezer and refrigerator storage, making them versatile for all your storage needs. These boxes can also store either hot, cold, wet or oily foods without leaking.
description: Are you hosting an event and need a reliable, eco-friendly solution for serving food? Look no further than our 50 These 7x5 inch biodegradable takeaway containers are designed for single-use food packaging that’s both convenient and environmentally responsible. Made entirely from bagasse, a sustainable byproduct of sugarcane processing, these containers contain no plastic and are fully compostable under proper conditions. Perfect for takeaways, food trucks, caterers, events, and restaurants, they are ideal for storing a variety of foods — hot, cold, or wet — while helping reduce your environmental footprint. The secure clamshell design with dual tab locks keeps contents intact during transport, making them ideal for serving meals on the go. Each container: Measures 7x5 inches and weighs 20 grams Is suitable for microwave use and safe for freezer and refrigerator storage Is intended strictly for one-time use (single-use) to maintain hygiene and food safety Choose our Clamshell Medium Boxes for a reliable, eco-friendly, and disposable solution to your packaging needs. Make a positive environmental impact with every order — no compromise on quality or convenience.
